creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Save this itinerary for the best weekend in Tampa, Florida’s, Hyde Park Village!

Stay: Epicurean Hotel

Eat: Elevage, Bar Taco, Meat Market

Do: Florida Aquarium, check out the murals, explore Hyde Park Village, ride bikes or walk Bayshore Blvd. 

Not in this video but a must do: Check out Oxford Exchange!

Hyde Park Village is a beautiful area of Tampa with upscale shopping, incredible restaurants and pretty little areas to explore. It’s such a picturesque area and the perfect place for a weekend getaway!

#thingstodoinflorida #floridahiddengems #floridabucketlist #tampaflorida #hydeparkflorida

transcription.text: Here's how to spend the perfect weekend in the Hyde Park Village District of Tampa, Florida, so steal this itinerary. Check into the Epicurean Hotel. This is a one-of-a-kind culinary-inspired hotel in Tampa, guaranteed to wow you with their food and drink offerings. The rooms here are well-appointed with comfy beds and linens, and there's a luxurious bathroom with a rain shower. The hotel pool is very nice with lots of seating. Then grab breakfast at the hotel's restaurant, Elavage. I'm still thinking about these breakfast potatoes. Next we're heading to explore Hyde Park Village. Here you will find high-end shopping, exceptional restaurants, and so many cute areas to explore and take pictures. For lunch, we're going to Bar Taco. This place is so good that I went here twice. These tacos are probably the best I've ever had. Then we're going to drive around and check out all the amazing murals that this area has to offer. My favorite was the Tampa Postcard Mural. Next we're going to the Tampa Aquarium to spend a couple hours admiring all the amazing marine life. I promise you this place is not just for kids. The aquariums are mesmerizing, and this is such a fun time for people of all ages. Then run some bikes from the hotel and ride down Bayshore Avenue and take in all the gorgeous mansions while riding along the waterfront. This is a great place for sunset. For dinner, we're going to the Meat Market. This place is so good. The filet was amazing, and the cookies and milk dessert was a 10 out of 10. Save this post and send it to someone you would want to visit here with.
